## bd assign

Assign an issue to someone.

Shorthand for 'bd update &lt;id&gt; --assignee &lt;name&gt;'.

Examples:
  bd assign bd-123 alice
  bd assign bd-123 ""      # unassign

```
bd assign <id> <name> [flags]
```
